news.t: 7 ESG ETFs to Buy for Responsible Profits
S&P Dow Jones Indices Wins ESG Investing's Best ESG Index Provider Award
ESG index funds hit $250 billion as pandemic accelerates impact investing boom

holdings.infoBox: NUSC is an equity ETF with a total of 411 individual holdings. The top holdings are ATI Inc. stock at 1.30%, TTM Technologies at 1.20%, TD SYNNEX at 1.18%, Sterling Infrastructure at 1.14%, and nVent Electric at 1.14%.

overview.description: The Nuveen ESG Small-Cap ETF (NUSC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Nuveen ESG USA Small Cap index. The fund tracks a multi-factor-weighted index of small-cap companies listed on US exchanges. Holdings are screened for environmental, social, and governance (ESG) criteria. NUSC was launched on Dec 13, 2016 and is issued by Nuveen.
infoTable: MSCI Nuveen ESG USA Small Cap

data.title: 7 ESG ETFs to Buy for Responsible Profits
data.text: Investors are rapidly moving toward investing with environmental, social and corporate-governance (ESG) qualities in mind.

data.title: ESG index funds hit $250 billion as pandemic accelerates impact investing boom
data.text: The number of sustainability-focused index funds, and investor assets in these funds, have doubled over the last three years, according to Morningstar, and Covid-19 added to interest.
